scripts.setup: npm --prefix frontend ci && uv sync --locked --all-groups --directory backend
scripts.backend: uv run --locked --directory backend uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000 --log-level debug
scripts.db:up: docker compose up -d --remove-orphans --wait db && docker compose up -d pgweb
scripts.db:migrate: uv run --locked --directory backend python -m alembic upgrade head
scripts.db:revision: uv run --locked --directory backend python -m alembic revision --autogenerate -m
scripts.lint: npm run lint:frontend && npm run lint:backend
scripts.test: npm run test:frontend && npm run test:backend
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage:frontend && npm run test:coverage:backend
